name: Finite System and Order Vector
description: Definition of a finite discrete system and its order vector containing the cardinalities of its state, input, and output spaces.

elements.text: The system Z is finite if and only if SZ, IZ, and OZ are finite sets.
The system Z is finite with order vector (k, m, n) if and only if (k, m, n) ∈ IJS+^3 and #SZ = k, #IZ = m, #OZ = n.
